summary: Completed comprehensive testing of supplement protocol management app. Backend API testing shows 87.5% success rate with proper functionality. Frontend is accessible and properly rendered. Critical issue found: role-based access control not enforced.

critical_bugs.issue: HC role can create/modify supplements when should be admin-only
critical_bugs.impact: Security breach - HC users have admin privileges

minor_issues.issue: Search returned empty results - may need test data

browser_automation_issues.issue: Browser automation tool failed to launch - environment issue
browser_automation_issues.impact: Could not perform comprehensive UI testing
browser_automation_issues.workaround: Manual HTML inspection shows proper rendering

ui_validation.details: Proper form elements, branding, demo credentials visible

passed_tests: List templates (9 templates found - 3 programs x 3 steps)
PDF exports (patient without costs, HC with costs)
success_percentage: Backend: 87.5% (14/16 tests), Frontend: Limited testing due to browser issues
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Implement role-based access control. HC users currently have admin privileges and can modify supplements/templates when they should only access Dashboard and New Plan features. Add proper authorization middleware to restrict admin endpoints.
